allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('push compound:', len\(d['push']['compound']\), '| pull:', len\(d['pull']['compound']\), '| legs:', len\(d['legs']['compound']\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total exercises:', len\(d\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('cardio machines:', len\(d['cardio']['machines']\), '| core:', len\(d['core']\), '| all:', len\(d['all']\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('startDate:', d['startDate'] if d else 'no schedule'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; print\('no schedule' if not sys.stdin.read\(1\) else 'has data'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ID:', d.get\('id'\)\); print\('templateId:', d.get\('templateId'\)\); print\('workoutDays:', d.get\('workoutDays'\)\); print\('Week 1 Day 1 exercises:', len\(d['schedule'][0]['days'][0]['workout']['exercises']\) if d.get\('schedule'\) else 'N/A'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; t=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Templates: {[x[\\"name\\"] for x in t]}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; t=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'API OK - Templates: {[x[\\"name\\"] for x in t]}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Schedule found:', d.get\('id'\) if d else 'None'\)")
